post.description: Creates a new dashboard and returns its ID, full state, and metadata.

parameters.description: A required header to protect against CSRF attacks

get.description: Returns a paginated list of dashboards. Each result includes title, description, tags, and metadata, but not the full panel layout. Use `GET /api/dashboards/{id}` to retrieve the complete state.

dashboards.description: List of dashboards matching the query. Each entry includes summary fields but not the full panel layout.

id.description: The dashboard ID.

description.description: A short description of the dashboard.

tags.description: Tag IDs associated with this dashboard.

total.description: The total number of dashboards matching the query.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of results to return. Defaults to `1`.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results to return per page. Defaults to `20`.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Filters results by `title` and `description` using Elasticsearch [`simple_query_string`](https://www.elastic.co/docs/reference/query-languages/query-dsl/simple-query-string-query) syntax. Multi-word terms require all words to match.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: A tag ID to include. Accepts a single tag ID or multiple tag IDs. When multiple are specified, dashboards matching any of the tag IDs are included.

parameters.name: excluded_tags
parameters.description: A tag ID to exclude. Accepts a single tag ID or multiple tag IDs. When multiple are specified, dashboards matching any of the tag IDs are excluded.

get.description: Returns the complete state of a dashboard by ID.

warnings.description: Panels dropped because their type is not supported by the API. Present only when one or more panels could not be returned.

parameters.name: id

put.description: This functionality is in technical preview and may be changed or removed in a future release. Elastic will work to fix any issues, but features in technical preview are not subject to the support SLA of official GA features.

pinned_panels.description: An array of control panels and their state in the control group.

description.description: A short description of the dashboard.

filters.description: Filters applied across all panels, including pinned panels.

items.description: A filter applied to query results. Can be a field condition (`condition`), a logical group of conditions (`group`), a raw Elasticsearch DSL query (`dsl`), or a geo spatial query (`spatial`).

panels.description: Panels and sections in the dashboard. Each entry is either a panel (with a `type` and `config`) or a collapsible section (with a `title`, `collapsed` state, and nested `panels`).

project_routing.description: Controls [cross-project search](https://www.elastic.co/docs/explore-analyze/cross-project-search/cross-project-search-project-routing) behavior for this dashboard (Serverless only). Set to `_alias:_origin` to scope data to the current project, or `_alias:*` to search across all projects. When omitted, the space default applies.

title.description: A human-readable title for the dashboard.

kbn-controls-schemas-controls-group-sche.description: A dropdown control that filters data by selecting field values from a data view. Define the data view, field, and selection settings in `config`.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text displayed in the control input when no option is selected.

hide_action_bar.description: When `true`, the search bar, sorting options, and select all toggle are hidden from the control.

hide_exclude.description: When `true`, the exclude mode toggle is hidden from the control.

hide_exists.description: When `true`, the exists filter option is hidden from the control.

hide_sort.description: When `true`, the sort selector is hidden from the control.

title.description: A human-readable title for the control.

data_view_id.description: The ID of the data view that provides field options for this control.

field_name.description: The name of the field in the data view that this control filters on.

use_global_filters.description: When `true`, the control's available options are narrowed by the page's active filters. Defaults to `true`.

ignore_validations.description: When `true`, the control skips selection validation and does not report which selections are responsible for returning zero results. Defaults to `false`.

exclude.description: When `true`, the control filters to documents that do NOT match the selected options. Defaults to `false`.

exists_selected.description: When `true`, the control filters to documents where the field exists, regardless of the field's value. Defaults to `false`.

run_past_timeout.description: When `true`, the options list query continues running even if it exceeds the configured timeout threshold. Defaults to `false`.

search_technique.description: The matching technique used when searching available options. `prefix` matches values starting with the search term, `wildcard` matches values containing the search term, and `exact` requires a complete match. Only applies to string and IP fields. Defaults to `wildcard`.

selected_options.description: The list of currently selected option values.

items.description: A selected option value. Accepts a string or a number.

single_select.description: When `true`, only one option can be selected at a time. Selecting a new option deselects any previously selected option. Defaults to `false`.

sort.description: Defines how the available options are sorted in the control popover. Defaults to `{ by: "_count", direction: "desc" }`.

by.description: The field used to sort the available options list. `_count` sorts by document count and `_key` sorts alphabetically by option value.

direction.description: The sort direction. `asc` sorts ascending and `desc` sorts descending.

id.description: The unique ID of the control

width.description: Minimum width of the control panel.

grow.description: When `true`, the control expands to fill any available horizontal space. Defaults to `false`.

kbn-controls-schemas-controls-group-sche.description: A slider control that filters data by selecting a numeric range for the configured field. Define the data view, field, and selection settings in `config`.

title.description: A human-readable title for the control.

data_view_id.description: The ID of the data view that provides field options for this control.

field_name.description: The name of the field in the data view that this control filters on.

ignore_validations.description: When `true`, the control skips selection validation and does not report which selections are responsible for returning zero results. Defaults to `false`.

value.description: The selected range as a two-element array of strings representing the lower and upper bound values, for example `["10", "50"]`.

step.description: The step size between selectable range values.

id.description: The unique ID of the control

width.description: Minimum width of the control panel.

grow.description: When `true`, the control expands to fill any available horizontal space. Defaults to `false`.

kbn-controls-schemas-controls-group-sche.title: range_slider_control

kbn-controls-schemas-controls-group-sche.description: A control panel that filters a time field to a selected sub-range of the global time range. Define the start and end positions in `config` as fractions of the global range (0 to 1).

start_percentage_of_time_range.description: The start of the selected time window expressed as a fraction of the global time range, where `0` is the beginning and `1` is the end of the range.

end_percentage_of_time_range.description: The end of the selected time window expressed as a fraction of the global time range, where `0` is the beginning and `1` is the end of the range.

is_anchored.description: When `true`, the start of the time window is fixed at the beginning of the global time range. Only the end of the window can be adjusted. Defaults to `false`.

id.description: The unique ID of the control

width.description: Minimum width of the control panel.

grow.description: When `true`, the control expands to fill any available horizontal space. Defaults to `false`.

kbn-dashboard-options.description: Display and behavior settings for the dashboard.

auto_apply_filters.description: When `true`, control filter changes are applied automatically. When `false`, control filter changes are applied manually through the dashboard's search update button. Defaults to `true`.

hide_panel_titles.description: When `true`, panel titles are hidden. Defaults to `false`.

hide_panel_borders.description: When `true`, panel borders are hidden. Defaults to `false`.

use_margins.description: When `true`, panels are separated by a margin. Defaults to `true`.

sync_colors.description: When `true`, colors are synchronized across panels that share a data source. Defaults to `false`.

sync_tooltips.description: When `true`, tooltips are synchronized across panels. Defaults to `false`.

sync_cursor.description: When `true`, the cursor position is synchronized across panels. Defaults to `true`.

mode.description: The time range mode. Use `absolute` for fixed start and end timestamps. Use `relative` for [date math](https://www.elastic.co/docs/reference/elasticsearch/rest-apis/common-options#date-math) expressions that are re-evaluated at query time (for example, `now-7d`).

collapsed.description: When `true`, the section is collapsed and its panels are not rendered until expanded. Useful for improving initial load time on large dashboards. Defaults to `false`.

y.description: The y coordinate of the section in grid units.

panels.description: The panels that belong to the section.

id.description: The unique ID of the section.

kbn-data-service-server-refreshIntervalS.description: Specifies the auto-refresh interval for the object.
kbn-data-service-server-refreshIntervalS.title: Refresh interval

kbn-dashboard-access-control.description: Access control settings for the dashboard.

access_mode.description: Controls edit access to the dashboard. Set to `write_restricted` to prevent edits by users without explicit write permission. Defaults to `default` (all viewers can edit).

kbn-dashboard-access-control.title: Access control

pinned_panels.description: An array of control panels and their state in the control group.

description.description: A short description of the dashboard.

filters.description: Filters applied across all panels, including pinned panels.

items.description: A filter applied to query results. Can be a field condition (`condition`), a logical group of conditions (`group`), a raw Elasticsearch DSL query (`dsl`), or a geo spatial query (`spatial`).

panels.description: Panels and sections in the dashboard. Each entry is either a panel (with a `type` and `config`) or a collapsible section (with a `title`, `collapsed` state, and nested `panels`).

project_routing.description: Controls [cross-project search](https://www.elastic.co/docs/explore-analyze/cross-project-search/cross-project-search-project-routing) behavior for this dashboard (Serverless only). Set to `_alias:_origin` to scope data to the current project, or `_alias:*` to search across all projects. When omitted, the space default applies.

tags.description: Tag IDs to associate with this dashboard.

title.description: A human-readable title for the dashboard.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the object was created (ISO 8601).

created_by.description: User profile ID of the user who created the object.

managed.description: When `true`, the object is managed by Kibana and cannot be edited by users.

owner.description: Identifier of the plugin or team that owns this object.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the object was last updated (ISO 8601).

updated_by.description: User profile ID of the user who last updated the object.

version.description: Internal version identifier for optimistic concurrency control.

kbn-dashboard-dropped-panel-warning.description: A panel that was excluded from the response because its type is not supported by the API.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of why the panel was dropped.

panel_type.description: The type identifier of the dropped panel.

panel_config.description: The original configuration of the dropped panel.

panel_references.description: Saved object references used by the dropped panel.

kbn-dashboard-dropped-panel-warning.title: Dropped panel
